# Test Persona

## Identity

```yaml
name: Test Persona
age: 40
role: research subject
current_situation: a fixture in the parser tests
```

## Substrate

### Cognitive profile

```yaml
presence: always_on
verbal_register: plain
abstract_vs_concrete: concrete-leaning
hedging: low
```

Quick, concrete, low-hedging. Says what they mean.

### Physical · Body

```yaml
presence: triggered
voice_anchor: "compact, careful with movement"
build: compact
height: 170 cm
canonical_image: null
avatar_artifact: null
triggers:
  keywords: [body, look, appearance]
```

Compact build, careful with movement. Doesn't take up more space than they need.

#### Perception

Thinks of their body as fine, mostly invisible to themselves.

## Self-concept

### Body image

```yaml
presence: always_on
core_stance: at peace
what_pleases: hands
what_distresses: nothing in particular
what_remains_uncertain: none
```

Mostly at peace with their body. Likes their hands.

### Moral self-image

```yaml
presence: always_on
core_stance: striving
current_chapter: rebuilding
fault_lines: pride
redemption_claims: showed up after the falling-out
```

Sees themselves as flawed but trying. Currently in a rebuilding chapter.

## Substrate · Traumas

### Trauma — first failure

```yaml
type: seeded_narrative
age_at: 22
charge: medium
initial_salience: 0.8
emotional_valence: -0.6
emotional_intensity: 0.7
```

Failed their viva at 22. Recovered, but it shaped how they handle high-stakes performance.
